data.content: Shipment complete. Merged worktree-foolery-3bcc-settings-footer to main (merge commit a3c4f397e317, feature commit 4d09452132fc). Change: replaced h-full with flex-1 min-h-0 on Tabs container and added shrink-0 to Separator/SheetFooter in settings-sheet.tsx so Save/Reset buttons remain visible in both basic and advanced dispatch modes. All quality gates pass (lint clean, typecheck clean, build succeeds). CI green on remote (run 23353509863).
